description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build all wheels for testing that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests. Use a matrix job that builds wheels on multiple operating systems (macos-12, macos-13-large, ubuntu-20.04, and windows-2019) with Python 3.11, installing cibuildwheel and twine, and running C++ tests. The workflow should build wheels for various Python versions and upload them as artifacts.
